module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for session runtime orchestration, model backend abstractions, and the implemented task execution runtime. lib.rs is re-export wiring and re-exports SessionContext beside Session and SessionState; the session child module owns Session, SessionState, SessionContext, host-preview bootstrap/query handling using ExecutionSignature::new for preview queries, Preview tool storage, and signed Step-event routing that is safely ignored as SessionEvent::Step(_, _); the model child module owns backend contracts, and the task child module owns Task, TaskState, Step, worker-level task/step/execution routing split across route_task_event, route_step_event, and route_execution_event, and StepSignature::new initial-step construction for SessionEvent::Step(signature, StepEvent) lifecycle/update/result messages from model steps.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. ModelRequest carries the model-facing task Step and derives only Debug/Clone now that Step is no longer Eq. ModelBackendImpl exposes only send, bridged to ModelBackend by a blanket impl; DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests, and ModelBackendError converts io, serde_json, and reqwest errors.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, SessionState storage with SessionContext, host-preview bootstrap via ExecutionSignature::new preview queries, Preview tool storage, and signed Step-event routing that is safely ignored as SessionEvent::Step(_, _).

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the implemented task runtime, including StepSignature::new initial-step construction that preserves the task signature for model steps.
